texts.label: text
texts.orig: Thank you for your interest in our properties The Cabanas (Boutique Hotel) and Pepo House (Private Villa) we would be honoured to host your clients for a memorable holiday.
texts.text: Thank you for your interest in our properties The Cabanas (Boutique Hotel) and Pepo House (Private Villa) we would be honoured to host your clients for a memorable holiday.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: I have attached our rates along with our cancellation policy. I have attached our room layout for both The Cabanas and Pepo Villa so you can see the options clearly.
texts.text: I have attached our rates along with our cancellation policy. I have attached our room layout for both The Cabanas and Pepo Villa so you can see the options clearly.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Please note the resident rates are commissionable to you at 10%
texts.text: Please note the resident rates are commissionable to you at 10%

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The International rates are commissionable to you at 20%
texts.text: The International rates are commissionable to you at 20%

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our rate includes breakfast and a two-course lunch and dinner with complimentary Wi-Fi throughout the property.
texts.text: Our rate includes breakfast and a two-course lunch and dinner with complimentary Wi-Fi throughout the property.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If your clients stay three nights or more the return transfer is included from the airport, Lamu or Shela.  If they stay less than three nights the transfer cost is 85USD each way. We will have our airport concierge collect your clients after baggage claim at Manda airport, and help them to our boat where our captain will be standing by to bring them to our beach, here our team will greet them. So they are guided well from the moment they touch down in Lamu.
texts.text: If your clients stay three nights or more the return transfer is included from the airport, Lamu or Shela.  If they stay less than three nights the transfer cost is 85USD each way. We will have our airport concierge collect your clients after baggage claim at Manda airport, and help them to our boat where our captain will be standing by to bring them to our beach, here our team will greet them. So they are guided well from the moment they touch down in Lamu.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are located on a serene stretch of beach which is a 30-minute boat ride from Lamu/airport/Shela. At this time we are unable to accept guests with severe medical allergies: eg: Lethal nut allergies.
texts.text: We are located on a serene stretch of beach which is a 30-minute boat ride from Lamu/airport/Shela. At this time we are unable to accept guests with severe medical allergies: eg: Lethal nut allergies.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We have wonderful mixologists and baristas who look after guests at the beachfront bar for cocktails, mocktails, and artisanal coffees. On-site, we also have a massage therapist, yoga shala, instructors, and a professional
texts.text: We have wonderful mixologists and baristas who look after guests at the beachfront bar for cocktails, mocktails, and artisanal coffees. On-site, we also have a massage therapist, yoga shala, instructors, and a professional

texts.label: text
texts.orig: is on standby for sunset cruises or day adventures around the islands should your clients wish to book this traditional experience and explore.
texts.text: is on standby for sunset cruises or day adventures around the islands should your clients wish to book this traditional experience and explore.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: If you have any questions please don’t hesitate to ask.
texts.text: If you have any questions please don’t hesitate to ask.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We hope to have the pleasure of hosting your clients soon,
texts.text: We hope to have the pleasure of hosting your clients soon,
